languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

languages.text: "Чую запах хорошей охоты. Если здесь есть достойный противник — пусть выйдет и померяется силами с волком! А те, кто предпочитает прятаться, мне не ровня".
"I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."
languages.original_text: "Чую запах хорошей охоты. Если здесь есть достойный противник — пусть выйдет и померяется силами с волком! А те, кто предпочитает прятаться, мне не ровня".

traits.locale_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."
"I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."
"I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

languages.text: 「いい狩りの匂いがする。ここに値打ちのある相手がいるなら、出てきて狼と力比べをしてみろ！隠れるなら、俺の仲間にはならない」
languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

traits.locale_text: 「いい狩りの匂いがする。ここに値打ちのある相手がいるなら、出てきて狼と力比べをしてみろ！隠れるなら、俺の仲間にはならない」

languages.text: « Tout ça présage une bonne chasse. S'il y a ici un adversaire digne de ce nom, qu'il se montre et mette sa force à l'épreuve contre celle d'un loup ! Et s'il préfère se cacher, il n'est pas mon égal. »
languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

traits.locale_text: « Tout ça présage une bonne chasse. S'il y a ici un adversaire digne de ce nom, qu'il se montre et mette sa force à l'épreuve contre celle d'un loup ! Et s'il préfère se cacher, il n'est pas mon égal. »

languages.text: "Ich rieche eine gute Jagd. Falls es hier einen würdigen Gegner gibt, soll er nur kommen und sich mit einem Wolf messen! Und falls er sich versteckt, ist er mir nicht ebenbürtig."
languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

traits.locale_text: "Ich rieche eine gute Jagd. Falls es hier einen würdigen Gegner gibt, soll er nur kommen und sich mit einem Wolf messen! Und falls er sich versteckt, ist er mir nicht ebenbürtig."

languages.text: "İyi av kokusunu alıyorum. Eğer burada layık bir rakip varsa çıkıp bir kurda karşı sınansın! Eğer saklanmayı seçerse de dengim değildir."
languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

traits.locale_text: "İyi av kokusunu alıyorum. Eğer burada layık bir rakip varsa çıkıp bir kurda karşı sınansın! Eğer saklanmayı seçerse de dengim değildir."

languages.text: «Huelo una buena cacería. ¡Si hay un adversario digno aquí, que salga y pruebe su fuerza contra un lobo! Y si prefiere esconderse, entonces es que no está a mi altura».
languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

traits.locale_text: «Huelo una buena cacería. ¡Si hay un adversario digno aquí, que salga y pruebe su fuerza contra un lobo! Y si prefiere esconderse, entonces es que no está a mi altura».

languages.text: “我嗅到了一场精彩狩猎的气息。如果这里有值得一战的对手，那就站出来，试试能否与老狼一较高下！如果他们选择躲藏，那就不配与我为敌。”
languages.original_text: "I smell a good hunt. If there is a worthy opponent here, let them come out and try their strength against a wolf! And if they choose to hide, they are not my equal."

traits.locale_text: “我嗅到了一场精彩狩猎的气息。如果这里有值得一战的对手，那就站出来，试试能否与老狼一较高下！如果他们选择躲藏，那就不配与我为敌。”
